content:
Aṣiṣe boṣewa lori idajọ ọjọgbọn oludari (professional judgment error) nigba ti a ba n ṣeto ipele pataki (significance level) ni pe eniyan le yan ipele pataki ti ko baamu ipo ayẹwo naa, boya o jẹ pupọ ju (too lenient) tabi kere ju (too strict). Eyi le fa ki a ṣe aṣiṣe ni ipinnu boya awọn abajade jẹ pataki tabi rara.

Nipa awọn nọmba pataki ti a yẹ ki a gbe ninu ifosiwewe idajọ (rounding of judgment factors) ṣaaju ki a to yika fun awọn iwe iṣẹ ayẹwo (audit working papers), ilana boṣewa ni pe:

- Awọn iye pataki (materiality thresholds) yẹ ki o wa ni deede to, ṣugbọn ko yẹ ki a yika wọn ni kutukutu ju. 
- A maa n fi awọn nọmba pataki
